excerpt:

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody,

I work for Crazy Ant Labs, a Monday partner and we’re working on an app that’ll turn Monday workdocs to a full fledged website, available outside of Monday. You’d be able to use it to create documentation sites, wikis, blogs, content sites and more.

If you’d like to get early access to the app, hear more about it and help us design it, please sign up using this form or feel free to comment or ask questions here.

Your feedback is appreciated!

Cheers,
Saggi
